headline: Positive Data from Phase 2 CADENCE Trial Provides Definitive Proof-of-Concept for WINREVAIR™ (sotatercept-csrk) in Adults With the Syndrome of Combined Post- and Precapillary Pulmonary Hypertension and Heart Failure With Preserved Ejection Fraction
summary: RAHWAY, N.J., March 29, 2026--Positive Data from Phase 2 CADENCE Trial Provides Definitive Proof-of-Concept for Merck’s WINREVAIR in Adults With CpcPH-HFpEF

headline: Back-up care benefits at work go beyond kids, aging parents as more employers pay for pets
summary: Companies are expanding employee benefits to cover a wide variety of caregiving needs, including back-up care for children, aging parents, and pets.

raw.headline: Back-up care benefits at work go beyond kids, aging parents as more employers pay for pets

headline: Merck: Aggressive M&A Efforts To Prepare For A Keytruda Patent Cliff
summary: Merck expands oncology via $5.7B Terns deal, but Keytruda dependence and 2028-29 patent cliff raise risk; review debt, valuation, and dividend before buying.
